from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Generate a fluent single‑sentence description from a list of triples."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping of predicate to natural‑language phrase
    phrase_map = {
        "almaMater": "graduated from",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "birthName": "was born as",
        "birthPlace": "was born in",
        "dateOfRetirement": "retired in",
        "occupation": "was a",
        "status": "has status",
        "timeInSpace": "spent",
        "mission": "participated in mission",
        "selectedByNasa": "was selected by NASA in",
        "deathDate": "died on",
        "nationality": "was a citizen of",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "served as chief of the astronaut office in",
        "title": "held the title",
        "ribbonAward": "received the ribbon award",
        "operator": "was operated by",
        "backupPilot": "had backup pilot",
        "commander": "had commander",
        "crewMembers": "had crew member",
        "representative": "was represented by",
        "alternativeName": "also known as",
        "awards": "received",
        "fossil": "has fossil",
        "senators": "has senators",
        "part": "is part of",
        "partsType": "has parts type",
        "higher": "is higher than",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "bird": "has bird",
        "leader": "has leader",
        "affiliation": "is affiliated with",
        "competeIn": "competes in",
        "president": "has president",
        "award": "received the award",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "gemstone": "has gemstone",
        "mascot": "has mascot",
        "cosparId": "has COSPAR ID",
        "utcOffset": "has UTC offset",
    }

    # Group predicates and objects by subject to avoid repeating the subject
    subj_map: dict[str, list[tuple[str, str]]] = {}
    for t in triples:
        subj_map.setdefault(t.subject, []).append((t.predicate, t.object))

    sentences = []
    for subj, pred_objs in subj_map.items():
        parts = []
        for pred, obj in pred_objs:
            phrase = phrase_map.get(pred, pred.replace("_", " "))
            parts.append(f"{phrase} {obj}")
        # join predicate phrases into a single clause for this subject
        if len(parts) == 1:
            clause = f"{subj} {parts[0]}"
        else:
            clause = f"{subj} " + ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
        sentences.append(clause)

    # Assemble final sentence across subjects
    if len(sentences) == 1:
        sentence = sentences[0]
    else:
        sentence = "; ".join(sentences[:-1]) + "; and " + sentences[-1]

    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
    if not sentence.endswith("."):
        sentence += "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
